meta_description: Learn how to marketing automation and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Marketing Automation to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'can't finish projects' trap. Use marketing automation, Antigravity, and Claude Code to accelerate your MVP launch and drive revenue faster.
content.answer_block: Stop building in a vacuum. By integrating automated marketing triggers directly into your development workflow, you convert your MVP into a revenue-generating engine before the code is even finished. Use Antigravity to scaffold the infrastructure and Claude Code to automate the deployment, ensuring your product launch is inevitable, not aspirational.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: your GitHub repository is a graveyard of 80% finished projects, each one a testament to the 'feature creep' that kills SaaS startups. You’re trapped in a cycle of infinite polish while your target market remains blissfully unaware of the value you could have delivered weeks ago.

It is time to stop being a developer and start being a founder. Marketing automation isn't just for 'growth hackers'; it is an architectural necessity. By embedding lead capture and automated engagement into your product's lifecycle, you force yourself to build for the user, not just for the commit history.

steps.title: Define the Revenue-First MVP Scope
steps.description: Strip away non-essential features. Focus only on the core value proposition that triggers a sign-up. We use Antigravity to generate a lean, production-ready boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lean SaaS boilerplate using Next.js and Tailwind. Include only user authentication, a Stripe integration, and a single 'waitlist' capture component.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Scaffold a minimal project structure with core Auth and Stripe modules'.

steps.title: Automate Lead Capture Hooks
steps.description: Every user action must be a marketing signal. We will implement automated email triggers for every sign-up.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route that accepts user emails and automatically triggers a welcome sequence via Resend API.

steps.title: Integrate Analytics for Velocity
steps.description: If you cannot measure user flow, you cannot ship. We integrate lightweight tracking to see where users drop off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup PostHog integration in the middleware to track funnel conversion from landing page to sign-up.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Install and configure PostHog tracking across all auth routes.'

steps.title: Build the Automated Waitlist Loop
steps.description: Create a viral loop where early access is granted through referral, ensuring your marketing scales automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a referral component that generates a unique share link for users on the waitlist.

steps.title: Deploy to Production with CI/CD
steps.description: Eliminate manual deployment friction. Every push to main should trigger a live update.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys to Vercel and runs automated smoke tests on every push.

pro_tips: Treat your marketing funnel as code: version control your email copy and sequence logic alongside your app code.
Ship the waitlist before the product: if you can't get 50 sign-ups for a landing page, the product won't save you.
Automate the 'Kill Switch': build a feature flag system early so you can disable broken features without redeploying the entire stack.
Don't build your own auth: use Clerk or NextAuth to save 40+ hours of security engineering.
Focus on 'Time to First Dollar': prioritize the payment flow over the dashboard design.
content.next_steps: Now that your automation backbone is in place, focus on driving traffic to your landing page and iterating based on the user data flowing into your dashboard.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas die in the text editor. Build, deploy, and automate your way to your first paying customer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
